module_header: module shift4(input clk, input areset_n, input load, input ena, input [3:0] data, output reg [3:0] q);
prompt: Implement a 4-bit shift register with asynchronous active-low reset. On reset, q becomes 0. Otherwise, load has priority over ena. When load is 1, q loads data. When ena is 1, q shifts left by one and shifts in 0 on q[0].
